sentences.arabic: كَانَ الطَّقْسُ حَارًّا حِينَ وَصَلُوا إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Bilo je vruće kad su stigli u grad.
sentences.translationEn: It was hot when they arrived in the city.

sentences.arabic: دَخَلُوا إِلَى مَقْهًى وَطَلَبُوا الْعَصِيرَ الْبَارِدَ.
sentences.translation: Ušli su u kafić i naručili hladan sok.
sentences.translationEn: They entered a cafe and ordered cold juice.

sentences.translation: Sjeli su u hladu i odmorili se.
sentences.translationEn: They sat in the shade and rested.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ خَرَجُوا وَاصْطَنَعُوا جُولَةً فِي الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon odmora izašli su i prošetali gradom.
sentences.translationEn: After resting they went out and took a walk through the city.
